title: Useful Flesh
description: Makes rotten flesh useful by giving it a smelting recipe.
body: The other day, I was thinking of datapack ideas, when I thought about rotten flesh. It's the worst food source in the game, yet there's a lot of it. So made [this](https://modrinth.com/datapack/useful-flesh) datapack, which fixes yet another issue. You can now smelt rotten flesh into leather, which has a lot of uses. As of 26.1.2, leather can be used to craft saddles, giving leather (and rotten flesh) a new use.
